an4.31:1.1: “There are these four wheels, endowed with which human beings & devas develop a four-wheeled prosperity; endowed with which human beings & devas in no long time achieve greatness & abundance in terms of wealth.
an4.31:1.3: Living in a civilized land, associating with people of integrity, directing oneself rightly, and having done merit in the past.
an4.31:1.4: These are the four wheels, endowed with which human beings & devas develop a four-wheeled prosperity; endowed with which human beings & devas in no long time achieve greatness & abundance in terms of wealth.
an4.31:2.1: “If you dwell in a civilized place,
an4.31:2.2: make friends with the noble ones,
an4.31:2.4: and have made merit in the past,
